calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

DANIEL BORNSTEIN, Esq. appeared for plaintiff VANGUARD PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, who was not present at today's hearing.
DEFT JENNIFER GALVEZ PRESENT.
NO ANSWER ON FILE BY DEFT GALVEZ.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff VANGUARD PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, and against the Defendant JENNIFER GALVEZ as follows:

RENTS/DAMAGES - $3250.; PER DIEM AT $108.33 P/DAY TOTALING $7474.08; COSTS $465.00.
FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT AND POSSESSION OF PROPERTY LOCATED AT 550 18TH STREET, #402, SF, CA

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-04-2011 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff Vanguard Property Management and with Craig Walddo.
Niles Rosenquest, Esq. for and with Defendant Jennifer Galvez, no appearance by Co-Defendant Donald Harbich.
The Judge Pro Tem Toni Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle, Trial Date confirmed.
